0.text: Solid nodule measuring 12.5x11 mm in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe extending to the pleura and surrounding parenchyma

1.text: Mild traction bronchiectasis accompanying solid nodule in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

2.text: Thick-walled central nodule with cavitation measuring approximately 17x18 mm

3.text: Multiple parenchymal and subpleural nodules in the right upper lobe

4.text: Largest parenchymal and subpleural nodule measuring 9.1x11 mm in the paramediastinal area of the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

5.text: Newly emerged focal ground-glass opacity in the anterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

6.text: Linear fibroatelectasis changes in the basal segments of both lower lobes

7.text: Central tubular bronchiectasis in both lungs
